overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural path at night, holding a torch that illuminates the surroundings. The journey progresses from an open meadow through a narrow trail with stone walls to a cliffside overlook.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the meadow, torch held high to light the way

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the meadow
tall green grass covering the meadow floor
tall green grass covering the meadow floor
clusters of purple wildflowers lining the path
clusters of purple wildflowers lining the path
full moon partially obscured by clouds illuminating the night sky
dark silhouette of forest on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through an open meadow at night, holding a torch that casts warm light on the trail. Purple wildflowers and tall grass line both sides of the path, while a full moon shines through scattered clouds overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with stone wall

events.description: path narrows and enters denser vegetation with stone wall appearing on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrowing path as the environment becomes more enclosed with bushes and trees

entered.detail: old stone wall running parallel to the path on the right side
thick bushes and shrubs crowding the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The open meadow gives way to a narrower trail enclosed by dense vegetation. An old stone wall appears on the right side and grows more prominent as the path winds through the increasingly forested area.

events.description: path curves left revealing cliffside overlook with water visible below

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff edge path, passing a wooden signpost while approaching the overlook

entered.detail: weathered wooden signpost with directional markers
dark water visible at the base of the cliff below
rocky cliff edge dropping off to the water below

segments.scene_description: The trail curves along a cliffside overlook, revealing a view of water below. A wooden signpost stands by the path as the ground becomes rockier, and the stone wall continues alongside the winding cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural night path that transforms from an open, moonlit meadow into a narrow, cliffside trail. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide expanse of tall grass and purple wildflowers, his torch casting a warm glow under a cloud-streaked full moon. As the path narrows, the open landscape gives way to dense vegetation and an old stone wall that emerges on the right, guiding the camera through an increasingly forested area. The scene then shifts as the trail curves along a rocky cliffside overlook, passing a wooden signpost while the stone wall continues to edge the precipice. Finally, the journey opens up to reveal a view of the water below, blending the torchlight with the dark expanse of the coast.
